In Good Company (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $45,489,752Details
International Box Office $17,973,443
Worldwide Box Office $63,463,195
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$151,750 (0.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.18 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:71.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3 opening theaters/1,963 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $84,866,314

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 29th, 2004 (Limited) by Universal
January 14th, 2005 (Expands Wide) by Universal
International Releases: April 22nd, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 22nd, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual content and drug references
Running Time: 110 minutes
Geographical setting: New York, New York City
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Fired, Infidelity, Mid-Life Crisis, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Unexpected Pregnancy
Social setting: Advertising and Marketing
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Depth of Field
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
